subcodes.first_line: The tongue of divine Revelation, in the realm of utterance, proclaimeth this blessed word: "This is the Day wherein all Sacred Books..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان وحی رحمن در ملکوت بیان باین کلمه مبارکه ناطق امروز روزیست که جمیع کتب
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
